name: The Pig and the Lady
tagline: Vietnamese-Hawaiian fusion from James Beard semifinalist Chef Andrew Le — the pho French dip is genius.
mustOrder: Pho French dip — prime rib dipped in pho broth, absolute game changer
Crispy crepe banh xeo — stuffed with shrimp, pork, and herbs
Smoked meat pho — rich bone broth with brisket and all the fixings
parking: Street parking on Waialae Ave. Civil Beat Plaza lot at 3650 Waialae Ave.
talkStory: Chef Andrew Le, son of Vietnamese refugees, started selling pho at the KCC Farmers Market and blew up from there. After 12 years in Chinatown, The Pig and the Lady moved to a bigger space in Kaimuki at 3650 Waialae Ave (Civil Beat Plaza), reopening October 2025. Le earned a James Beard semifinalist nomination for Best Chef West. The pho French dip — prime rib dipped in pho broth — is genius-level fusion. Saturday farmers market booth still has lines. Dinner reservations recommended.
